# Ayman Abusura

> Full-Stack Developer specializing in modern web applications, scalable backend systems, Telegram bots, and Telegram Mini Apps, built with React, Node.js, and related technologies.

Ayman Abusura is a Full-Stack Developer with experience across frontend, backend, and Telegram bot/Mini App development. This site is a personal portfolio showcasing his background, technical skills, and project work.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://aymanabusura.vercel.app/): Overview, skills, experience, and contact information.
- [Sitemap](https://aymanabusura.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexed pages.

## Contact

- [Habr Career](https://career.habr.com/aymanabusura)

## Notes

- This site is a single-page application; all content is rendered client-side from the homepage.
- For structured data about Ayman, see the Person schema embedded in the homepage `<head>`.
